name: Daily digest
description: Recurring daily summary from an automated agent: a headline, pre-rendered sections, a dashboard link, and an unsubscribe link in the footer. Carries the mandatory automated-sender disclosure.
subject: {{agent_name}} daily digest — {{date}}

variables.name: company_name
variables.description: Sender company or product name; rendered as the header wordmark and in the footer.

variables.name: support_email
variables.description: Support contact email address shown in the footer.

variables.name: company_address
variables.description: Physical mailing address for the footer (CAN-SPAM).

variables.name: preheader
variables.description: Hidden inbox preview text shown next to the subject line.

variables.name: agent_name
variables.description: Name of the agent sending the digest.

variables.name: headline
variables.description: One-line, numbers-first headline for the day; doubles as the heading.

variables.name: sections_html
variables.description: Raw pre-rendered digest sections: block-level HTML (paragraphs or simple tables) with inline styles, inserted verbatim between the headline and the dashboard button. Optionally add class="text-main" / class="text-sub" to cells for dark-mode support.
variables.example:
Invoices: 128 processed, 0 errors

Needs review: 2 flagged for manual approval

variables.name: sections_text
variables.description: Plain-text digest sections for the text part, hard-wrapped to 70 characters.
variables.example:
Invoices: 128 processed, 0 errors
Needs review: 2 flagged for manual approval

variables.name: dashboard_url
variables.description: URL of the agent's dashboard or digest detail page.

variables.name: unsubscribe_html
variables.description: Raw pre-rendered unsubscribe link for the footer: a single inline-styled <a> element pointing at the recipient's unsubscribe URL.
